goal: is_iso_pair[O, M](c, f, g) = (c.src(f) = c.dst(g) and c.src(g) = c.dst(f) and c.compose(g, f) = c.identity(c.src(f)) and c.compose(f, g) = c.identity(c.dst(f)))
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { (x0.src(x1) = x0.dst(x2) and x0.src(x2) = x0.dst(x1) and x0.identity(x0.src(x1)) = x0.compose(x2, x1) and x0.identity(x0.dst(x1)) = x0.compose(x1, x2)) = is_iso_pair[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[O, M](c, f, g)

goal: c.src(g) = c.dst(f) and c.src(f) = c.dst(g) and c.compose(f, g) = c.identity(c.src(g)) and c.compose(g, f) = c.identity(c.dst(g))

function[T0, T1](x0: Iso[T0, T1], x1: Category[T0, T1], x2: T1, x3: T1) { Option.some[Iso[T0, T1]](x0) != Iso.new[T0, T1](x1, x2, x3) or x0.cat = x1 }[O, M](e, c, f, g)

function[T0, T1](x0: Iso[T0, T1], x1: Category[T0, T1], x2: T1, x3: T1) { Option.some[Iso[T0, T1]](x0) != Iso.new[T0, T1](x1, x2, x3) or x0.inv = x3 }[O, M](e, c, f, g)

goal: exists(k0: Iso[O, M]) { Iso.new[O, M](c, c.identity(x), c.identity(x)) = Option.some(k0) }
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { Iso.constraint[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = is_iso_pair[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[O, M](c, c.identity(x), c.identity(x))

function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { not Iso.constraint[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or exists(k0: Iso[T0, T1]) { Option.some[Iso[T0, T1]](k0) = Iso.new[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) } }[O, M](c, c.identity(x), c.identity(x))

goal: exists(k0: Iso[O, M]) { k0.cat = c and k0.hom = c.identity(x) and k0.inv = c.identity(x) }
proof: e.cat = c
c.identity(x) = e.hom
function(x0: Iso[O, M]) { not (x0.cat = c and x0.hom = c.identity(x) and x0.inv = c.identity(x)) }(e)

goal: exists(k0: Iso[O, M]) { k0.cat = e.cat and k0.hom = e.inv and k0.inv = e.hom }
proof: h.inv = e.hom
h.cat = e.cat
function(x0: Iso[O, M]) { not (x0.cat = e.cat and x0.hom = e.inv and e.hom = x0.inv) }(h)
